description: GitHub Universe 2025 marked a transformative moment in software development, introducing agentic development—where developers and AI agents collaborate seamlessly throughout the software lifecycle.

major_announcements.title: Agent HQ
major_announcements.description: A unified workspace where developers can create, manage, and collaborate with multiple AI agents across the entire software lifecycle. Empowers users to assign and track agent tasks, monitor interactions, and apply collaborative best practices within teams.
key_features: Create and manage multiple AI agents
Integration with partner agents (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI Codex)
major_announcements.impact: Revolutionizes how developers work with AI agents by providing centralized management and collaboration

major_announcements.title: Enterprise Agent Control Plane
major_announcements.description: A new layer that gives enterprises robust governance and policy enforcement for managing AI/agent fleets and custom agents securely and compliantly.
major_announcements.impact: Enables enterprises to adopt AI agents at scale while maintaining security and compliance

major_announcements.title: Multi-Model Agent Support
major_announcements.description: Copilot and Agent HQ now support additional AI models, giving developers flexibility in agent selection for different tasks.
major_announcements.impact: Provides developers choice and flexibility to use the best model for their specific use case

major_announcements.title: Plan Mode in VS Code
major_announcements.description: A new VS Code feature that enables developers and agents to collaboratively plan, organize, and execute multi-step projects directly within the editor.
major_announcements.impact: Enhances developer control and transparency over coding and implementation decisions

major_announcements.title: Agentic Code Review
major_announcements.description: Copilot leverages CodeQL and LLM intelligence for deeper code reviews—detecting vulnerabilities and suggesting fixes automatically.
key_features: Focus on security and code quality
major_announcements.impact: Enables developers to focus on higher-level concerns while AI handles routine security checks

major_announcements.title: Copilot Metrics Dashboard
major_announcements.description: Enterprises can track Copilot usage, adoption, user metrics, model distribution, and code contributions across organizations.
major_announcements.impact: Brings data-driven oversight and governance to AI-powered development

major_announcements.title: GitHub Code Quality
major_announcements.description: Provides org-wide visibility into code maintainability, reliability, and test coverage, helping teams improve overall code health.
major_announcements.impact: Helps teams systematically improve code quality across all repositories

statistics.copilot_adoption: Nearly 80% of new users try Copilot in their first week

key_themes: Agentic Development: Seamless collaboration between developers and AI agents
Enterprise Governance: Security and compliance at scale
Developer Choice: Multiple AI models and flexible tools
Code Quality: Automated reviews and organization-wide insights
Community & Learning: Certifications, training, and developer experiences
